Section 1  
Define the function to process the input data and return the desired output.  

Section 2  
Initialize a dictionary to store the most common improvement for each age group.  

Section 3  
Iterate through each participant in the list.  

Section 4  
For each participant, update the dictionary by counting the frequency of each improvement.  

Section 5  
Determine the most frequent improvement for each age group.  

Section 6  
Return the final dictionary with the most common health improvement per age group.  

Section 7  
* Use a dictionary to track improvements.  
* Return the most frequent improvement for each group.
